description: Six UI fixes: slider alignment, turn popup spacing, harvest hex width, region modal 3-figure margins, shinto icon glow, politics track overflow
steps: In src/components/ActionPanel.tsx around line 163: Add minWidth: '5.5em' to the <span> containing t('actions.bribeLabel') text (the first <span> inside each label). Do the same for the <span> containing t('actions.requestLabel'). This ensures both slider labels have equal width so sliders align.

In src/components/GameBoard.tsx around line 555: Change marginTop: '-16px' to marginTop: '-20px' on the

element containing the turn popup text. This moves the text further from the accept button.
In src/App.css: Change .harvest-hex width from 76px to 88px (keep height:76px).

In src/components/RegionDetailModal.tsx around line 530: In the frontFigures.map when frontFigures.length === 3, add marginLeft: '135px' to the first figure's div (index === 0) and marginRight: '135px' to the last figure's div (index === 2).

In src/components/TemplePanel.tsx around line 176: Change the SVG style filter from 'drop-shadow(1px 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.6))' to `drop-shadow(0 0 4px ${figColor}) drop-shadow(0 0 8px ${figColor})` to add a colored glow matching the player's clan color.

In src/App.css: Add overflow:visible to the .politics-track rule. Also add position:relative;z-index:1200 to .game-header to establish a stacking context, but since the politics track hover z-index is 1200 and it needs to appear above the header, instead set .game-header z-index to something lower or set .politics-track-slot.filled:hover z-index higher. The real fix: add overflow:visible to .politics-track and set .game-header to have z-index:auto (or not set one) so it does not create a stacking context that clips children of siblings.
acceptance_criteria: npx vite build succeeds with no errors
Both slider labels (bribe and request) have minWidth: '5.5em' so sliders start at same position
First figure in 3-figure front layout has marginLeft:'135px', last has marginRight:'135px'
Shinto torii SVG icons use colored glow filter with figColor
.politics-track has overflow:visible so scaled slots are not clipped by the header
verification: Run npx vite build and confirm no TypeScript or build errors
